turns.text: Hello! Thank you for calling DigeeSell. I'm Digee, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
Can you guys let me know what other services you provide?
We offer a wide range of services including SEO, social media management, Google Ads, website design, email marketing, and more. Would you like more details on a specific service?

I apologize if that wasn’t clear. We provide services like content marketing, online reputation management, e-commerce solutions, and video production, among others. Would you like to know more about any particular service?

It seems like you meant SEO. We specialize in improving website visibility through strategies like keyword research, on-page optimization, and link building. Would you like to explore how we can help your business with SEO?
I’m here to help! Could you please clarify what you meant? I want to make sure I provide the information you need.
Sure, go ahead! What would you like to know?
but I don't prize all the SEAL services that are required.
I understand that you're looking for specific pricing for our SEO services. I can have one of our specialists call you back with exact details. Would that work for you?
that will work for me, but could you let me know what a
